side a
side a frg.@surface side aside a frg.@surface side a  (beginning line missing)
side a frg.@surface side a 1'1'

[...] x [...]

[...] ... [...]

side a frg.@surface side a 2'2'

[... li-is]-⸢su⸣-ḫu [...]

[...] may they remove [...]

side a frg.@surface side a 3'3'

[... li-is]-su-u₂ [...]

[...] may they eradicate [...]

side a frg.@surface side a 4'4'

[... li-šal]-⸢la?⸣-mu [...]

[...] may they correct [...]

side a frg.@surface side a 5'5'

[...] x ma-aq-tu₂ [...]

[...] ... the fallen one [...]

side a frg.@surface side a 6'6'

[... li]-šir [...]

[...] may he become right [...]
